plan_metadata.title: ROS系统架构改进实施计划 — P0 W2/W3 + P1 + P2
plan_metadata.last_commit: a367fa5 (fix: 修复AI-Z审核发现的3个Critical + TS编译错误)

verification_requirements.py.code: product_plan_id=plan.id if isinstance(plan.id, int) else None (BUG - ProductPlan.id is String UUID)
verification_requirements.py.severity: BUG - type mismatch, always writes None

missing: No event log query/management API endpoints
Event types hardcoded in EventTypes class, no dynamic registration

missing_or_incomplete: ECR/ECO trigger not implemented (ecr_id is null, analyze_bom_change is stub)
No automatic trigger on Prototype change
No cert relationship graph (Cert <-> ECR <-> ECO <-> Prototype)

phase_tasks.title: Remove product_plan_id write from _generate_project_from_plan
phase_tasks.description: Line 460 of _generate_project_from_plan still sets product_plan_id=plan.id (deprecated). Remove this parameter. The caller on_approval_completed already creates ProductPlanProjectLink.

phase_tasks.title: Fix VerificationRequirement.product_plan_id type mismatch
phase_tasks.description: VerificationRequirement.product_plan_id is Integer but ProductPlan.id is String(36) UUID. Fix: change column type to String(36) + ForeignKey; fix write logic in verification_requirements.py:132; update phase6_s1.py schemas.

phase_tasks.title: Audit VerificationRequirement.product_plan_id usage beyond Project
phase_tasks.description: VR.product_plan_id is independent from Project (VR directly links to Plan for digital thread). Audit usage. Recommend keep but fix type.

phase_tasks.title: Audit dual-trigger for plan.approved (approval layer vs Saga layer)
phase_tasks.description: on_approval_completed creates Project + Link, then emit_async 'plan.approved'. saga_engine.on_plan_approved also creates Project + Link via Saga. Check for double-creation risk. on_approval_completed already creates Project before emitting event, so Saga's _action_create_project could create a 2nd Project.

phase_tasks.title: Clean up VR schema product_plan_id type
phase_tasks.description: Update phase6_s1.py VR schema product_plan_id to str (UUID string) to match ProductPlan.id type.

phase_tasks.title: Create data consistency verification script for ProductPlanProjectLink vs Project
phase_tasks.description: Script to verify: 1) All Projects from ProductPlan have ProductPlanProjectLink; 2) No orphan ProductPlanProjectLink; 3) No Project linked to multiple Plans through old+new ways; 4) Auto-fix missing links.

phase_tasks.title: Search and clean all direct Project.product_plan_id references in codebase
phase_tasks.description: Global search for Project.product_plan_id, project.product_plan_id in backend and frontend. Confirm no reads/writes outside model definition.

phase_tasks.title: Final cleanup of Project.product_plan_id DEPRECATED column
phase_tasks.description: After verification: 1) Remove FK constraint + relationship; 2) Keep column as nullable isolated (for backward compat); 3) Remove DEPRECATED comment; 4) Remove viewonly relationship.

phase_tasks.title: Update Pydantic schemas to remove Project.product_plan_id
phase_tasks.description: Add ProductPlanProjectLink related fields (plan_ids: list[str]) to replace product_plan_id in ProjectCreate/Out.

phase_tasks.title: Create independent Event Log management API
phase_tasks.description: Create new file: GET /api/events (paginated, filterable), GET /api/events/{id}, GET /api/events/plan/{plan_id}/timeline, GET /api/events/saga/{saga_id}. Reuse EventStore methods.

phase_tasks.title: Create webhook subscription/registration endpoints
phase_tasks.description: Create WebhookSubscription model + API: POST/DELETE/GET webhooks, GET webhook logs. Reuse existing webhook_service.py. Add retry (exponential backoff, max 3).

phase_tasks.title: Refactor on_plan_approved to eliminate double Project creation
phase_tasks.description: Option B (recommended): approval creates Project+Link, emit plan.approved with project_id param. Saga checks project_id, skips create_project step. Modify event_handlers.py:342 on_plan_approved to handle project_id parameter.

phase_tasks.title: Add dynamic event type registration capability
phase_tasks.description: Extend EventBus: add register_type(event_type, version), list_registered_types(). Keep static EventTypes as seed. Add GET /api/events/types endpoint.

phase_tasks.title: Frontend event monitoring panel (event stream visualization)
phase_tasks.description: Event monitoring page: real-time event list (polling), filter by type/plan_id/status, event detail dialog, Saga execution tree, Event Timeline visualization.

phase_tasks.title: Add event replay endpoint for admin
phase_tasks.description: POST /api/events/plan/{plan_id}/replay (admin only) - replay events to rebuild state. POST /api/events/plan/{plan_id}/reemit/{event_id} - re-emit specific event.

phase_tasks.title: Refactor Saga from inline calls to event-driven
phase_tasks.description: Current Saga uses synchronous step execution. Refactor: Saga steps become EventBus event/handler pairs. SagaCoordinator becomes orchestrator that emits events in sequence. Keep sync fallback for compatibility.

phase_tasks.title: Create ChangeImpactRule CRUD API
phase_tasks.description: Add to existing s2_change_impact.py: POST/PUT/DELETE /rules, GET /rules paginated. Schemas already defined in phase6_s2.py.

phase_tasks.title: Implement ECR/ECO triggered impact analysis
phase_tasks.description: Implement ECR/ECO triggered analysis: analyze_by_ecr(), analyze_by_eco(). Fill ChangeImpactRecord.ecr_id. Implement analyze_bom_change() stub. Add EventBus listeners for ECR/ECO status changes.

phase_tasks.title: Implement Prototype change auto-trigger for impact analysis
phase_tasks.description: Auto-call ChangeImpactEngine.analyze_prototype_change on Prototype update. Add EventBus handler for 'prototype.updated'. Generate record and notify stakeholders.

phase_tasks.title: Frontend: Cert impact chain visualization
phase_tasks.description: Impact chain visualization: record list table, relationship graph (force-directed or tree), rule CRUD UI, drill-down showing impacted certificates list.

phase_tasks.title: Frontend: Rule management page
phase_tasks.description: Independent rule management page: rule list (trigger_type/value/impact_level/cert_types), create/edit dialog, enable/disable toggle, rule templates. Add to S2 cert menu.

phase_tasks.title: Add impact analysis statistics/report API
phase_tasks.description: Add stats endpoint: GET /api/s2/change-impact/stats (count by impact level), filter by ecr_id, CSV export.

execution_phases.name: P0 W2 - Audit & Fix (High Priority)
execution_phases.goal: Eliminate all writes to deprecated field, fix type bugs

execution_phases.name: P0 W2 - Saga/Approval Dual Path Risk
execution_phases.goal: Understand and prevent double Project creation on plan.approved

execution_phases.name: P0 W3 - Verify & Clean
execution_phases.goal: Zero legacy references, data consistent, final DEPRECATED removal

execution_phases.name: P1 - Event Bus Infrastructure
execution_phases.goal: Independent event bus API and management capability

execution_phases.name: P1 - Saga Refactor + Replay
execution_phases.goal: Saga from inline to event-driven, eliminate double creation, add replay

execution_phases.name: P2 - Rules CRUD + ECR/Proto Trigger
execution_phases.goal: Rule management, ECR/ECO trigger, Prototype auto-analysis

execution_phases.name: P2 - Frontend Visualization + Reports
execution_phases.goal: Impact chain visualization + rule management frontend + stats API

P0W2-T1.impact: Each plan approval writes to deprecated field unnecessarily
P0W2-T1.mitigation: Simple param removal, verify ProductPlanProjectLink exists in caller

P0W2-T2.impact: ProductPlan.id UUID String written to Integer column - always None, VR->Plan link lost
P0W2-T2.mitigation: Change column type + FK, fix API write logic

P0W2-T4.impact: Could create duplicate Projects for same Plan approval
P0W2-T4.mitigation: Add idempotent protection (project_id param check in saga)

P0W3-T3.impact: Column deletion could break production DB migration compat
P0W3-T3.mitigation: Keep column, drop FK+relationship only. Next major version: drop column

P1-T3.mitigation: Option B: approval creates Project, saga skips create

P1-T7.impact: Event-driven Saga may introduce timing/ordering issues
P1-T7.mitigation: Keep sync fallback, event-driven as optional mode first

P2-T2.impact: ECR/ECO changes don't auto-trigger cert impact analysis
P2-T2.mitigation: Start with manual trigger API, auto-trigger in next phase

P0W3-T1.impact: Existing data may have Projects missing ProductPlanProjectLink

summary_statistics.critical_path: P0W2-T1 -> P0W2-T4 -> P1-T3 -> P1-T7 (P0 -> Saga refactor mainline)
